title: exomicrum cabrae
side_effects: Exomicrum cabrae can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea and stomach cramps, as well as increased heart rate and blood pressure. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to nausea, vomiting, and dizziness. Additionally, prolonged use of exomicrum cabrae may cause kidney damage and liver toxicity, as the plant's active compounds can be toxic to the body in high concentrations. If not handled correctly, the plant's side effects can be severe and even life-threatening.
